name: Certified Angus Beef Marinades
recipeIngredient: 1 12 oz. can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
These marinades will tenderize about 2 pounds of steak or a 3 to 4 pound roast.
To marinate: Combine ingredients. Place beef in a zipper-locking plastic bag and pour marinade over beef. Close bag removing air; refrigerate; marinate for about 15 minutes to 2 hours.
Note: Extend marinating time to a minimum of 6 hours to tenderize.
